title: pilosella obsistens
intro: Pilosella officinarum, also known as Pilosella obsistens, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's leaves and roots have been found to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Pilosella officinarum can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is often used to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as to soothe sore muscles and joints.
